# Plant heirloom tomatoes

## Status

- **Phase:** Draft
- **Type:** feature
- **Sprint:** spring-planting
- **Story:** raised-beds

## Approach

Start the seedlings indoors, then transplant into the [raised beds](../stories/raised-beds/STORY-raised-beds.md)
once the last frost has passed. This section exists to give the plan viewer some
**rich markdown** to render.

Varieties to sow this year:

- Brandywine
- Cherokee Purple
- San Marzano

Water with `drip-irrigation` on a timer, roughly:

```
0600  20 minutes
1800  20 minutes
```
